ECSchema.description: Views that introduce derived concepts based on the OpenSite schema.

Deprecated.Description: This view has been split into LayoutParkingAreaView and ParkingRowPathView.

QueryView.Query: SELECT drivenParkingRows.ECInstanceId [ECInstanceId], ec_classid('OpenSiteViews', 'ParkingInformationView') [ECClassId], NAVIGATION_VALUE(opnsiteViews.ParkingInformationView.LayoutParkingArea, drivenParkingRows.LayoutParkingAreaId), NAVIGATION_VALUE(opnsiteViews.ParkingInformationView.ParkingRowPath, drivenParkingRows.ParkingRowPathId), SUM(drivenParkingRows.ParkingSpaceCount) [ParkingSpaceCount], SUM(drivenParkingRows.ProblemSpaceCount) [ProblemSpaceCount] FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(layoutParkingArea.ECInstanceId, rowPath.ECInstanceId) [ECInstanceId], layoutParkingArea.ECInstanceId [LayoutParkingAreaId], CASE WHEN layoutParkingArea.ECInstanceId IS NULL THEN rowPath.ECInstanceId END [ParkingRowPathId], pr.ECInstanceId [ParkingRowId], MAX(pr.ParkingSpaceCount) [ParkingSpaceCount], MAX(pr.ProblemSpaceCount) [ProblemSpaceCount] FROM CivilSpatial:ParkingRow pr JOIN bis:ElementDrivesElement relDrive ON pr.ECInstanceId=relDrive.TargetECInstanceId JOIN bis:Element drivingElement ON relDrive.SourceECInstanceId=drivingElement.ECInstanceId LEFT JOIN OpenSite:LayoutParkingArea layoutParkingArea ON drivingElement.Parent.Id=layoutParkingArea.ECInstanceId LEFT JOIN OpenSite:ParkingRowPath rowPath ON drivingElement.ECInstanceId=rowPath.ECInstanceId WHERE layoutParkingArea.ECInstanceId IS NOT NULL OR rowPath.ECInstanceId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY COALESCE(layoutParkingArea.ECInstanceId, rowPath.ECInstanceId), COALESCE(layoutParkingArea.ECClassId, rowPath.ECClassId), layoutParkingArea.ECInstanceId, CASE WHEN layoutParkingArea.ECInstanceId IS NULL THEN rowPath.ECInstanceId END, pr.ECInstanceId ) drivenParkingRows GROUP BY drivenParkingRows.ECInstanceId, drivenParkingRows.LayoutParkingAreaId, drivenParkingRows.ParkingRowPathId;

WITH parkingRowOwners AS ( -- 1. The parking row is driven directly by the LayoutParkingArea itself. SELECT pr.ECInstanceId [ParkingRowId], layoutParkingArea.ECInstanceId [LayoutParkingAreaId] FROM CivilSpatial:ParkingRow pr JOIN bis:ElementDrivesElement relDrive ON relDrive.TargetECInstanceId = pr.ECInstanceId JOIN OpenSite:LayoutParkingArea layoutParkingArea ON layoutParkingArea.ECInstanceId = relDrive.SourceECInstanceId
UNION
-- 2. The parking row is driven by a child element of the LayoutParkingArea, -- for example a layout parking edge. SELECT pr.ECInstanceId [ParkingRowId], layoutParkingArea.ECInstanceId [LayoutParkingAreaId] FROM CivilSpatial:ParkingRow pr JOIN bis:ElementDrivesElement relDrive ON relDrive.TargetECInstanceId = pr.ECInstanceId JOIN bis:Element sourceElement ON sourceElement.ECInstanceId = relDrive.SourceECInstanceId JOIN OpenSite:LayoutParkingArea layoutParkingArea ON layoutParkingArea.ECInstanceId = sourceElement.Parent.Id
UNION
-- 3. The parking row is driven by a grandchild of the LayoutParkingArea, -- for example an edge under a driveway path. SELECT pr.ECInstanceId [ParkingRowId], layoutParkingArea.ECInstanceId [LayoutParkingAreaId] FROM CivilSpatial:ParkingRow pr JOIN bis:ElementDrivesElement relDrive ON relDrive.TargetECInstanceId = pr.ECInstanceId JOIN bis:Element sourceElement ON sourceElement.ECInstanceId = relDrive.SourceECInstanceId JOIN bis:Element parentElement ON parentElement.ECInstanceId = sourceElement.Parent.Id JOIN OpenSite:LayoutParkingArea layoutParkingArea ON layoutParkingArea.ECInstanceId = parentElement.Parent.Id ) SELECT owners.LayoutParkingAreaId [ECInstanceId], ec_classid('OpenSiteViews', 'LayoutParkingAreaView') [ECClassId], NAVIGATION_VALUE( opnsiteViews.LayoutParkingAreaView.LayoutParkingArea, owners.LayoutParkingAreaId ), SUM(pr.ParkingSpaceCount) [ParkingSpaceCount], SUM(pr.ProblemSpaceCount) [ProblemSpaceCount] FROM parkingRowOwners owners JOIN CivilSpatial:ParkingRow pr ON pr.ECInstanceId = owners.ParkingRowId GROUP BY owners.LayoutParkingAreaId;

SELECT parkingRowPathParkingRows.ParkingRowPathId [ECInstanceId], ec_classid('OpenSiteViews', 'ParkingRowPathView') [ECClassId], NAVIGATION_VALUE(opnsiteViews.ParkingRowPathView.ParkingRowPath, parkingRowPathParkingRows.ParkingRowPathId), SUM(parkingRowPathParkingRows.ParkingSpaceCount) [ParkingSpaceCount], SUM(parkingRowPathParkingRows.ProblemSpaceCount) [ProblemSpaceCount] FROM ( SELECT rowPath.ECInstanceId [ParkingRowPathId], pr.ECInstanceId [ParkingRowId], MAX(pr.ParkingSpaceCount) [ParkingSpaceCount], MAX(pr.ProblemSpaceCount) [ProblemSpaceCount] FROM OpenSite:ParkingRowPath rowPath JOIN bis:ElementDrivesElement relDrive ON rowPath.ECInstanceId=relDrive.SourceECInstanceId JOIN CivilSpatial:ParkingRow pr ON relDrive.TargetECInstanceId=pr.ECInstanceId GROUP BY rowPath.ECInstanceId, pr.ECInstanceId ) parkingRowPathParkingRows GROUP BY parkingRowPathParkingRows.ParkingRowPathId;

WITH RECURSIVE AggregationDepth(id, depth) AS ( SELECT ECInstanceId, 0 FROM CivilSpatial.Site UNION ALL SELECT agg.TargetECInstanceId, parent.depth + 1 FROM SpatialComposition.SpatialStructureElementAggregatesElements agg JOIN AggregationDepth parent ON agg.SourceECInstanceId = parent.id ) SELECT drv.SourceECInstanceId [ECInstanceId], ec_classid('OpenSiteViews', 'AreaView') [ECClassId], NAVIGATION_VALUE(opnsiteViews.AreaView.Area, drv.SourceECInstanceId), SUM(ce.FootprintArea) [TotalFootprintArea] FROM AggregationDepth ad JOIN OpenSite.AuthoringElementDrivesPlanElements drv ON drv.TargetECInstanceId = ad.id JOIN SpatialComposition.CompositeElement ce ON ce.ECInstanceId = ad.id WHERE ad.depth = 1 GROUP BY drv.SourceECInstanceId

WITH RECURSIVE AggregationDepth(id, depth) AS ( SELECT ECInstanceId, 0 FROM CivilSpatial.Site UNION ALL SELECT agg.TargetECInstanceId, parent.depth + 1 FROM SpatialComposition.SpatialStructureElementAggregatesElements agg JOIN AggregationDepth parent ON agg.SourceECInstanceId = parent.id ) SELECT drv.SourceECInstanceId [ECInstanceId], ec_classid('OpenSiteViews', 'ControlledAreaView') [ECClassId], NAVIGATION_VALUE(opnsiteViews.ControlledAreaView.Area, drv.SourceECInstanceId), SUM(ce.FootprintArea) [TotalFootprintArea] FROM AggregationDepth ad JOIN OpenSite.AuthoringElementDrivesPlanElements drv ON drv.TargetECInstanceId = ad.id JOIN SpatialComposition.CompositeElement ce ON ce.ECInstanceId = ad.id WHERE ad.depth = 2 GROUP BY drv.SourceECInstanceId

Deprecated.Description: This relationship has been replaced by LayoutParkingAreaHasLayoutParkingAreaView.
This relationship has been replaced by ParkingRowPathHasParkingRowPathView.
